name: Deep Mehta
title: Systems, Backend & AI Engineering Student
shortHeadline: CS student focused on backend systems, distributed computing, AI engineering, and problem solving through consistent practice and hands-on projects.
bio: Computer Science student focused on backend engineering, distributed systems, and AI applications. Interested in understanding how scalable software systems are architected — from API design and database modeling to system behavior under load. Works through problems methodically across DSA platforms, builds practical backend projects, and explores AI engineering workflows. Curious about operating systems, computer networks, and what makes production systems reliable.
